settings.title:
THERE’S NO LIMIT TO WHAT
YOU CAN DO.
The most advanced personal training only at Jovian

settings.editor: At The Gym we want you to exercise your options to suit your needs.

We are the un-corporation; owned and operated by a Master Personal Trainer with over 25 years experience in the health and fitness industry. Our mission is to provide you with all the tools you need to reach your fitness goals in a clean, vibrant, engaging environment you will be proud to call your GYM. We won’t hold you hostage like other fitness clubs, you’ll want to stay because we care!
Whether you want to wind down, try something new or push yourself to your limits, we have a class for you!

Kickboxing is a group of stand-up combat sports based on kicking and punching, historically developed from Karate, Muay Thai, and Western boxing. Kickboxing is practiced for self-defense, general fitness, or as a contact sport.

The kettlebell is a cast-iron weight used to perform ballistic exercises that combine cardiovascular, strength and flexibility training. They are also the primary equipment used in the weightlifting sport.
A spiritual and ascetic discipline, a part of which, including breath control, simple meditation, and the adoption of specific bodily postures, is widely practiced for health and relaxation.

settings.title: Explore the equipment and amenities at Jovian's Gym.

settings.editor: Jovian members seek the best of the best in all that they do, which is why they choose Jovian and all of the amenities has to offer. Whether you are looking for a place to reach your health & fitness goals, a place to unwind and take a break from your busy life, or a place to meet new people and join in on fun social events, Jovian brings you the best of all worlds and has something for everyone.

settings.description_text: Our temperature-controlled group exercise studios boast special flooring, sound systems and over 50 Les Mills, Zumba and Mind & Body classes per week — all taught by certified instructors.

settings.title: Weight Loss, Personalized Training and much more...

settings.editor: Dennis Dias is one of Jovian’s most fierce and dedicated trainers. Now 29 years old, Dennis began his quest in martial arts at the age of 15 learning Judo, Jiu Jitsu, and Karate before settling into Muay Thai and Boxing.

Our mission is to help you
achieve YOUR fitness goals

Our mission is to help you achieve YOUR fitness goals and maximize the health benefits of your exercise. Most people are not here to become professional athletes, bodybuilders, or fitness models, and we fully understand that.

settings.title: HERE IS WHAT THEY HAVE TO SAY

settings.testimonial_content: “After a quick but intense hour we not only had a great workout, but also felt accomplished, and made some new friends along the way. It is true about what they say: Brick took our workout to a whole new level.”

settings.editor: Enjoy the serenity of a beautiful sunset as Blake guides you through a 75-minute yoga class on our stunning terrace. Rejuvenate as you breathe in the fresh summer air and relax as you exhale the stress of your day. Namaste.
